prompt: Create a Terraform configuration for my domain myapp.io that has: an A record pointing to 10.0.0.1, a CNAME for www, MX records for email at mail.myapp.io, SPF and DMARC records, and a CAA record for Let's Encrypt. Use OVERWRITE mode.

assertions.name: has_a_record
assertions.description: Configuration has A record for apex with correct IP

assertions.name: has_mx_records
assertions.description: Configuration has MX records for mail.myapp.io

assertions.name: has_caa_record
assertions.description: Configuration has CAA record for Let's Encrypt

assertions.name: trailing_dots_correct
assertions.description: CNAME and MX addresses have trailing dots
assertions.check: CNAME and MX addresses end with '.'
